Net Sales.description: Total net sales revenue (USD). Requires a date range filter.
Net Sales.example: Net Sales for Q4 2024 in Germany

Margin.description: Gross margin in USD (Net Sales minus cost). Requires a date range filter.

Margin %.description: Gross margin as a percentage of Net Sales. Requires a date range filter.

Quantity.description: Total units sold. Requires a date range filter.
Quantity.example: Quantity sold by subcategory in H1 2024
